name: Veritate 200M (default base model, two-phase QAT)
description: The default base model trainer. Pure-vanilla Veritate at 200M, tuned for byte-level TinyStories coherence. Two-phase recipe: train non-QAT first (qat_enabled=false), then resume with qat_enabled=true for the last ~25% of the budget. Exports to a v9 INT8 binary that loads cleanly on the C engine. Hyperparameters derived from TinyStories paper + minGPT + PyTorch QAT recipe.
